# One Can Get from Any Point in Space to Any Other Point in Space

> It is a matter of common experience that one can get from any point in space to any other point in space.

**Citation:** Hawking, Stephen. *A Brief History of Time*. Bantam Books, 1988. Kindle edition. 2   Space and Time, p. 25, loc. 357.
